name: Honey-Apple Butter
recipeIngredient: 8 cups Pared, cored and quartered Cooking apples (about 3 pounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat cider to boiling in a Dutch oven.
2. Boil uncovered about 15 minutes or until cider measures 2 cups.
3. Add apples and lemon. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat. Simmer uncovered about 1 hour, stirring occasionally,
until apples are very soft.
5. Mash with potato masher if necessary to remove all lumps.
6. Stir in honey, brown sugar, and cinnamon.
7. Heat until boiling; reduce heat.
8. Simmer uncovered about 1-1/2 hours, stirring occasionally, until no
liquid separates from the pulp.
9. Pour mixture into hot, sterilized jars, leaving 1/4-inch headspace.
10. Wipe rims of jars and seal.
11. Cool on a rack for 1 hour.
12. Store in refrigerator up to 2 months.
